goal: Fix RR-12: Upgrade Go servers (mcp-server/main.go, tester/main.go) from tls.VersionTLS12 to tls.VersionTLS13, add unit tests verifying TLS 1.3 minimum, and update documentation to mark RR-12 as resolved.

tasks.name: Upgrade mcp-server TLS to 1.3
tasks.action: Change `tls.VersionTLS12` to `tls.VersionTLS13` on line 497 in the server's TLSConfig.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes (cluster/agent/test.sh). `grep 'tls.VersionTLS13' cluster/agent/fileserver/main.go` returns the updated line.
tasks.done: mcp-server/main.go uses tls.VersionTLS13 as MinVersion and all existing tests pass.

tasks.name: Add TLS 1.3 unit test to mcp-server
tasks.action: Add a test function `TestTLSMinVersion13` that starts an httptest TLS server using the same TLSConfig pattern from main.go (MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS13), then verifies: (1) a TLS 1.3 client connects successfully, (2) a client forced to TLS 1.2 max (via tls.Config{MaxVersion: tls.VersionTLS12}) is rejected with a handshake error. Import `crypto/tls` and `net/http` as needed.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. The new test appears in test output and passes.
tasks.done: TestTLSMinVersion13 exists in mcp_test.go and passes, confirming TLS 1.2 connections are rejected.

tasks.name: Upgrade tester-server TLS to 1.3
tasks.action: Change `tls.VersionTLS12` to `tls.VersionTLS13` on line 211 in the server's TLSConfig.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes (cluster/tester/test.sh). `grep 'tls.VersionTLS13' cluster/tester/main.go` returns the updated line.
tasks.done: tester/main.go uses tls.VersionTLS13 as MinVersion and all existing tests pass.

tasks.name: Add TLS 1.3 unit test to tester-server
tasks.action: Add a test function `TestTLSMinVersion13` that creates a net/http Server with the same TLSConfig (MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS13) and test certs (use httptest.NewUnstartedServer + server.TLS = &tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS13} then StartTLS), then verifies: (1) a default TLS client connects successfully, (2) a client with MaxVersion: tls.VersionTLS12 gets a handshake error. Import `crypto/tls` as needed.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. The new test appears in test output and passes.
tasks.done: TestTLSMinVersion13 exists in main_test.go and passes, confirming TLS 1.2 connections are rejected.

tasks.name: Update docs to mark RR-12 resolved
tasks.action: In THREAT_MODEL.md: (1) Update the RR-12 entry in §6 to strikethrough format with RESOLVED status, matching the pattern of other resolved RRs (e.g., RR-7). Add status text: 'Fixed. Both mcp-server/main.go and tester/main.go now use tls.VersionTLS13. Unit tests verify TLS 1.2 connections are rejected.' (2) In §5 'TLS Everywhere' subsection, change the parenthetical from 'though TLS 1.2 is lower than ideal; Caddy uses 1.3' to reflect all services now use TLS 1.3. (3) In the §9 table, change RR-12 status from 'Open' to '✅ Done (2026-03-29)'. In PLAN.md: Change the RR-12 checkbox from `[ ]` to `[X]` and add a 'Done' note matching the style of other resolved items.
tasks.verify: grep for 'RR-12' in both files shows resolved/done status. No remaining 'Open' or unchecked references to RR-12.
tasks.done: Both THREAT_MODEL.md and PLAN.md mark RR-12 as resolved with consistent descriptions.
